ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the country's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_data" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption data record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the data is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "spirits" REAL /* Consumption of spirits (in liters per capita) */,
  "beer" REAL /* Consumption of beer (in liters per capita) */,
  "wine" REAL /* Consumption of wine (in liters per capita) */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total consumption of alcoholic beverages (in liters per capita) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country for the given year */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of consumption by gender */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of consumption by age groups */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the population */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the consumption data */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data (1-10) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beverage_types" (
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beverage type */,
  "beverage_name" TEXT /* Name of the beverage type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the beverage type */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Typical alcohol content of the beverage type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year covered by the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the annual report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumption data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for security purposes */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumption_id") REFERENCES consumption_data ("consumption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beverage type */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend analysis */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend analysis (0-1) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for trend analysis */,
  "visual_representation" TEXT /* File path to the visual representation of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_beverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_id") REFERENCES beverage_types ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
